name: GitHub REST API
description: Access GitHub repositories, users, issues, pull requests, actions, and the entire GitHub platform.
longDescription: The GitHub REST API provides programmatic access to virtually everything on GitHub — repositories, issues, pull requests, commits, branches, releases, GitHub Actions, Gists, notifications, organizations, and user data. The API is widely used for building developer tools, bots, CI/CD integrations, portfolio sites, and GitHub Apps. Unauthenticated requests are rate limited to 60/hour; with OAuth token up to 5,000/hour.
pricing: Free: 60 req/hour unauthenticated; 5,000 req/hour with token
affiliateText: Deploy your GitHub-powered app on Vercel with automatic GitHub integration.
